mapper.select: select m_no from member where m_nick = #{nick}
mapper.insert: insert into message (ms_no, send_m_no, recv_m_no, ms_content, ms_date) values ( seq_message.NEXTVAL, #{send_m_no}, (select m_no from member where m_nick = #{recv_nick}), #{ms_content}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: select m.*, mem.m_nick as send_nick from message m join member mem on m.send_m_no =mem.m_no where m.recv_m_no = #{m_no} and m.recv_del= 'N' order by m.ms_date desc
select m.*, mem.m_nick as recv_nick from message m join member mem on m.recv_m_no = mem.m_no where m.send_m_no = #{m_no} and m.send_del = 'N' order by m.ms_date desc
select m.*, (select m_nick from member where m_no = m.send_m_no) as send_nick, (select m_nick from member where m_no = m.recv_m_no) as recv_nick from message m where ms_no = #{ms_no}
mapper.update: update message set ms_recv = 'Y' where ms_no = #{ms_no} and recv_m_no = #{m_no}
